<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<system xmlns:xi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XInclude">
  <!-- Content between markers will be preserved if codegen is rerun -->

  <xi:include href="microkit.schedule.xml" />

  <protection_domain name="producer_p_p_producer_MON" domain="domain_2">
    <program_image path="producer_p_p_producer_MON.elf" />
    <protection_domain name="producer_p_p_producer" domain="domain_2" id="1">
      <program_image path="producer_p_p_producer.elf" />
      <map mr="top_impl_Instance_producer_p_p_producer_write_port_1_Memory_Region"
           vaddr="0x10_000_000"
           perms="rw"
           setvar_vaddr="write_port_queue_1"
      />

      <!-- BEGIN CONTENT MARKER producer_p_p_producer -->
      <!-- END CONTENT MARKER producer_p_p_producer -->
    </protection_domain>

    <!-- BEGIN CONTENT MARKER producer_p_p_producer_MON -->
    <!-- END CONTENT MARKER producer_p_p_producer_MON -->
  </protection_domain>

  <protection_domain name="consumer_p_p_consumer_MON" domain="domain_3">
    <program_image path="consumer_p_p_consumer_MON.elf" />
    <protection_domain name="consumer_p_p_consumer" domain="domain_3" id="1">
      <program_image path="consumer_p_p_consumer.elf" />
      <map mr="top_impl_Instance_producer_p_p_producer_write_port_1_Memory_Region"
           vaddr="0x10_000_000"
           perms="r"
           setvar_vaddr="read_port_queue_1"
      />

      <!-- BEGIN CONTENT MARKER consumer_p_p_consumer -->
      <!-- END CONTENT MARKER consumer_p_p_consumer -->
    </protection_domain>

    <!-- BEGIN CONTENT MARKER consumer_p_p_consumer_MON -->
    <!-- END CONTENT MARKER consumer_p_p_consumer_MON -->
  </protection_domain>

  <protection_domain name="consumer_p_s_consumer_MON" domain="domain_4">
    <program_image path="consumer_p_s_consumer_MON.elf" />
    <protection_domain name="consumer_p_s_consumer" domain="domain_4" id="1">
      <program_image path="consumer_p_s_consumer.elf" />
      <map mr="top_impl_Instance_producer_p_p_producer_write_port_1_Memory_Region"
           vaddr="0x10_000_000"
           perms="r"
           setvar_vaddr="read_port_queue_1"
      />

      <!-- BEGIN CONTENT MARKER consumer_p_s_consumer -->
      <!-- END CONTENT MARKER consumer_p_s_consumer -->
    </protection_domain>

    <!-- BEGIN CONTENT MARKER consumer_p_s_consumer_MON -->
    <!-- END CONTENT MARKER consumer_p_s_consumer_MON -->
  </protection_domain>

  <protection_domain name="pacer" domain="domain_1">
    <program_image path="pacer.elf" />

    <!-- BEGIN CONTENT MARKER pacer -->
    <!-- END CONTENT MARKER pacer -->
  </protection_domain>

  <memory_region name="top_impl_Instance_producer_p_p_producer_write_port_1_Memory_Region"
                 size="0x1_000" />

  <channel>
    <end pd="pacer" id="61" />
    <end pd="producer_p_p_producer_MON" id="61" />
  </channel>

  <channel>
    <end pd="producer_p_p_producer_MON" id="60" />
    <end pd="producer_p_p_producer" id="60" />
  </channel>

  <channel>
    <end pd="pacer" id="59" />
    <end pd="consumer_p_p_consumer_MON" id="59" />
  </channel>

  <channel>
    <end pd="consumer_p_p_consumer_MON" id="58" />
    <end pd="consumer_p_p_consumer" id="58" />
  </channel>

  <channel>
    <end pd="pacer" id="57" />
    <end pd="consumer_p_s_consumer_MON" id="57" />
  </channel>

  <channel>
    <end pd="consumer_p_s_consumer_MON" id="56" />
    <end pd="consumer_p_s_consumer" id="56" />
  </channel>

  <!-- BEGIN MSD CONTENT MARKER -->
  <!-- END MSD CONTENT MARKER -->
</system>

<!-- This file will not be overwritten if HAMR codegen is rerun -->

<domain_schedule>
  <domain name="domain_1" length="30" /> <!-- pacer -->
  <domain name="domain_2" length="100" /> <!-- producer_p_p_producer_MON -->
  <domain name="domain_1" length="30" /> <!-- pacer -->
  <domain name="domain_3" length="100" /> <!-- consumer_p_p_consumer_MON -->
  <domain name="domain_1" length="30" /> <!-- pacer -->
  <domain name="domain_4" length="100" /> <!-- consumer_p_s_consumer_MON -->
  <domain name="domain_0" length="610" /> <!-- padding -->
</domain_schedule>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<system xmlns:xi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XInclude">
  <!-- Content between markers will be preserved if codegen is rerun -->

  <xi:include href="microkit.monitor.schedule.xml" />

  <protection_domain name="producer_p_p_producer_MON" domain="domain_2">
    <program_image path="producer_p_p_producer_MON.elf" />
    <protection_domain name="producer_p_p_producer" domain="domain_2" id="1">
      <program_image path="producer_p_p_producer.elf" />
      <map mr="top_impl_Instance_producer_p_p_producer_write_port_1_Memory_Region"
           vaddr="0x10_000_000"
           perms="rw"
           setvar_vaddr="write_port_queue_1"
      />

    <!-- BEGIN CONTENT MARKER producer_p_p_producer_MON -->

  <protection_domain name="consumer_p_p_consumer_MON" domain="domain_3">

    <protection_domain name="consumer_p_p_consumer" domain="domain_3" id="1">

           vaddr="0x10_000_000"
           perms="r"

  <protection_domain name="consumer_p_s_consumer_MON" domain="domain_4">

      <program_image path="consumer_p_s_consumer.elf" />
      <map mr="top_impl_Instance_producer_p_p_producer_write_port_1_Memory_Region"
           vaddr="0x10_000_000"

           setvar_vaddr="read_port_queue_1"

      <!-- BEGIN CONTENT MARKER consumer_p_s_consumer -->
      <!-- END CONTENT MARKER consumer_p_s_consumer -->
    </protection_domain>

    <!-- BEGIN CONTENT MARKER consumer_p_s_consumer_MON -->

  </protection_domain>

  <protection_domain name="monitor_process_monitor_thread_MON" domain="domain_5">
    <program_image path="monitor_process_monitor_thread_MON.elf" />
    <protection_domain name="monitor_process_monitor_thread" domain="domain_5" id="1">
      <program_image path="monitor_process_monitor_thread.elf" />
      <map mr="top_impl_Instance_producer_p_p_producer_write_port_1_Memory_Region"
           vaddr="0x10_000_000"
           perms="r"
           setvar_vaddr="producer_p_p_producer_write_port_queue_1"
      />

      <!-- BEGIN CONTENT MARKER monitor_process_monitor_thread -->
      <!-- END CONTENT MARKER monitor_process_monitor_thread -->
    </protection_domain>

    <!-- BEGIN CONTENT MARKER monitor_process_monitor_thread_MON -->
    <!-- END CONTENT MARKER monitor_process_monitor_thread_MON -->
  </protection_domain>

  <protection_domain name="pacer" domain="domain_1">
    <program_image path="pacer.elf" />

    <!-- BEGIN CONTENT MARKER pacer -->
    <!-- END CONTENT MARKER pacer -->
  </protection_domain>

  <memory_region name="top_impl_Instance_producer_p_p_producer_write_port_1_Memory_Region"
                 size="0x1_000" />

  <channel>
    <end pd="pacer" id="61" />
    <end pd="producer_p_p_producer_MON" id="61" />
  </channel>

  <channel>
    <end pd="producer_p_p_producer_MON" id="60" />
    <end pd="producer_p_p_producer" id="60" />
  </channel>

  <channel>
    <end pd="pacer" id="59" />
    <end pd="consumer_p_p_consumer_MON" id="59" />
  </channel>

  <channel>
    <end pd="consumer_p_p_consumer_MON" id="58" />
    <end pd="consumer_p_p_consumer" id="58" />
  </channel>

  <channel>
    <end pd="pacer" id="57" />
    <end pd="consumer_p_s_consumer_MON" id="57" />
  </channel>

  <channel>
    <end pd="consumer_p_s_consumer_MON" id="56" />
    <end pd="consumer_p_s_consumer" id="56" />
  </channel>

  <channel>
    <end pd="pacer" id="55" />
    <end pd="monitor_process_monitor_thread_MON" id="55" />
  </channel>

  <channel>
    <end pd="monitor_process_monitor_thread_MON" id="54" />
    <end pd="monitor_process_monitor_thread" id="54" />
  </channel>

  <!-- BEGIN MSD CONTENT MARKER -->
  <!-- END MSD CONTENT MARKER -->
</system>

<!-- This file will not be overwritten if HAMR codegen is rerun -->

<domain_schedule>
  <domain name="domain_1" length="30" /> <!-- pacer -->
  <domain name="domain_2" length="100" /> <!-- producer_p_p_producer_MON -->
  <domain name="domain_1" length="30" /> <!-- pacer -->
  <domain name="domain_5" length="50" /> <!-- monitor_process_monitor_thread_MON -->
  <domain name="domain_1" length="30" /> <!-- pacer -->
  <domain name="domain_3" length="100" /> <!-- consumer_p_p_consumer_MON -->
  <domain name="domain_1" length="30" /> <!-- pacer -->
  <domain name="domain_5" length="50" /> <!-- monitor_process_monitor_thread_MON -->
  <domain name="domain_1" length="30" /> <!-- pacer -->
  <domain name="domain_4" length="100" /> <!-- consumer_p_s_consumer_MON -->
  <domain name="domain_1" length="30" /> <!-- pacer -->
  <domain name="domain_5" length="50" /> <!-- monitor_process_monitor_thread_MON -->
  <domain name="domain_0" length="370" /> <!-- padding -->
</domain_schedule>

# Do not edit this file as it will be overwritten if HAMR codegen is rerun

override MICROKIT_SDK := $(abspath ${MICROKIT_SDK})

# SYSTEM_MAKEFILE points to the makefile containing all compile/link rules.
# Override this only if you want to substitute an entirely different rule set
SYSTEM_MAKEFILE ?= system.mk

# By default we make a debug build so that the client debug prints can be seen.
export MICROKIT_CONFIG ?= debug

export CPU = cortex-a53
export QEMU = qemu-system-aarch64

export AR := ar
export CC := clang
export DTC := dtc
export LD := ld.lld
export RANLIB := llvm-ranlib

export TOP_DIR := $(abspath $(dir ${MAKEFILE_LIST}))
export TOP_BUILD_DIR := $(abspath build)

export CRATES_DIR := $(TOP_DIR)/crates

export TARGET := aarch64-none-elf

export MICROKIT_SDK := $(abspath $(MICROKIT_SDK))
export MICROKIT_TOOL := $(abspath $(MICROKIT_SDK)/bin/microkit)
export MICROKIT_BOARD_DIR := $(abspath $(MICROKIT_SDK)/board/$(MICROKIT_BOARD)/$(MICROKIT_CONFIG))

IMAGE_FILE := $(TOP_BUILD_DIR)/loader.img
REPORT_FILE := $(TOP_BUILD_DIR)/report.txt

# By default, cargo-verus is used to build Rust crates, and it fails if verification does not succeed.
# To skip verification, set the RUST_MAKE_TARGET environment variable to use a cargo build target.
# Example:
#
#   RUST_MAKE_TARGET=build-release make

all: ${IMAGE_FILE}

.PHONY: check_microkit
check_microkit:
	@if [ -z "$(strip $(MICROKIT_BOARD))" ]; then \
		echo "MICROKIT_BOARD must be specified"; \
		exit 1; \
	fi
	@if [ -z "$(strip $(MICROKIT_SDK))" ]; then \
		echo "MICROKIT_SDK must be specified"; \
		exit 1; \
	fi

${IMAGE_FILE}: check_microkit ${TOP_BUILD_DIR}/Makefile FORCE
	${MAKE} -C ${TOP_BUILD_DIR} $(notdir $@)

qemu ${REPORT_FILE}: $(IMAGE_FILE)
	${MAKE} -C ${TOP_BUILD_DIR} $(notdir $@)

clean:: ${TOP_BUILD_DIR}/Makefile
	${MAKE} -C ${TOP_BUILD_DIR} clean

clobber:: clean
	rm -rf $(TOP_DIR)/build

${TOP_BUILD_DIR}/Makefile: $(SYSTEM_MAKEFILE)
	mkdir -p ${TOP_BUILD_DIR}
	cp $(SYSTEM_MAKEFILE) ${TOP_BUILD_DIR}/Makefile

test:: ${TOP_BUILD_DIR}/Makefile
	${MAKE} -C ${TOP_BUILD_DIR} test

verus: ${TOP_BUILD_DIR}/Makefile
	${MAKE} -C ${TOP_BUILD_DIR} verus

FORCE:

# Do not edit this file as it will be overwritten if HAMR codegen is rerun

MICROKIT_TOOL ?= $(MICROKIT_SDK)/bin/microkit

CFLAGS := -mcpu=$(CPU) \
	-mstrict-align \
	-ffreestanding \
	-nostdlib \
	-g3 \
	-O3 \
	-Wall -Wno-unused-function -Werror -Wno-unused-command-line-argument \
	-I$(MICROKIT_BOARD_DIR)/include \
	-target $(TARGET)

LDFLAGS := -L$(MICROKIT_BOARD_DIR)/lib
LIBS := --start-group -lmicrokit -Tmicrokit.ld --end-group

MSD ?= microkit.system

IMAGES := producer_p_p_producer.elf producer_p_p_producer_MON.elf consumer_p_p_consumer.elf consumer_p_p_consumer_MON.elf consumer_p_s_consumer.elf consumer_p_s_consumer_MON.elf monitor_process_monitor_thread.elf monitor_process_monitor_thread_MON.elf pacer.elf
IMAGE_FILE = loader.img
REPORT_FILE = report.txt

UTIL_OBJS = printf.o util.o

TYPES_DIR = $(TOP_DIR)/types
TYPE_OBJS := $(TOP_DIR)/build/sb_queue_int8_t_1.o

# exporting TOP_TYPES_INCLUDE in case other makefiles need it
export TOP_TYPES_INCLUDE = -I$(TYPES_DIR)/include

TOP_INCLUDE = $(TOP_TYPES_INCLUDE) -I$(TOP_DIR)/util/include

all: $(IMAGE_FILE)
	CHECK_FLAGS_BOARD_MD5:=.board_cflags-$(shell echo -- ${CFLAGS} ${MICROKIT_BOARD} ${MICROKIT_CONFIG}| shasum | sed 's/ *-//')

${CHECK_FLAGS_BOARD_MD5}:
	-rm -f .board_cflags-*
	touch $@

%.o: ${TOP_DIR}/util/src/%.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ -I$(TOP_DIR)/util/include

$(TOP_DIR)/build/sb_queue_int8_t_1.o: $(TOP_DIR)/types/src/sb_queue_int8_t_1.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ $(TOP_INCLUDE)


# monitor
producer_p_p_producer_MON.o: $(TOP_DIR)/components/producer_p_p_producer/src/producer_p_p_producer_MON.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ $(TOP_INCLUDE) -I$(TOP_DIR)/components/producer_p_p_producer/include

# user code
producer_p_p_producer_user.o: $(TOP_DIR)/components/producer_p_p_producer/src/producer_p_p_producer_user.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ $(TOP_INCLUDE)/ -I$(TOP_DIR)/components/producer_p_p_producer/include

producer_p_p_producer.o: $(TOP_DIR)/components/producer_p_p_producer/src/producer_p_p_producer.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ $(TOP_INCLUDE) -I$(TOP_DIR)/components/producer_p_p_producer/include

# monitor
consumer_p_p_consumer_MON.o: $(TOP_DIR)/components/consumer_p_p_consumer/src/consumer_p_p_consumer_MON.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ $(TOP_INCLUDE) -I$(TOP_DIR)/components/consumer_p_p_consumer/include

# user code
consumer_p_p_consumer_user.o: $(TOP_DIR)/components/consumer_p_p_consumer/src/consumer_p_p_consumer_user.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ $(TOP_INCLUDE)/ -I$(TOP_DIR)/components/consumer_p_p_consumer/include

consumer_p_p_consumer.o: $(TOP_DIR)/components/consumer_p_p_consumer/src/consumer_p_p_consumer.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ $(TOP_INCLUDE) -I$(TOP_DIR)/components/consumer_p_p_consumer/include

# monitor
consumer_p_s_consumer_MON.o: $(TOP_DIR)/components/consumer_p_s_consumer/src/consumer_p_s_consumer_MON.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ $(TOP_INCLUDE) -I$(TOP_DIR)/components/consumer_p_s_consumer/include

# user code
consumer_p_s_consumer_user.o: $(TOP_DIR)/components/consumer_p_s_consumer/src/consumer_p_s_consumer_user.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ $(TOP_INCLUDE)/ -I$(TOP_DIR)/components/consumer_p_s_consumer/include

consumer_p_s_consumer.o: $(TOP_DIR)/components/consumer_p_s_consumer/src/consumer_p_s_consumer.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ $(TOP_INCLUDE) -I$(TOP_DIR)/components/consumer_p_s_consumer/include

# monitor
monitor_process_monitor_thread_MON.o: $(TOP_DIR)/components/monitor_process_monitor_thread/src/monitor_process_monitor_thread_MON.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ $(TOP_INCLUDE) -I$(TOP_DIR)/components/monitor_process_monitor_thread/include

# user code
monitor_process_monitor_thread_rust:
	make -C ${CRATES_DIR}/monitor_process_monitor_thread $(RUST_MAKE_TARGET)

monitor_process_monitor_thread.o: $(TOP_DIR)/components/monitor_process_monitor_thread/src/monitor_process_monitor_thread.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ $(TOP_INCLUDE) -I$(TOP_DIR)/components/monitor_process_monitor_thread/include

pacer.o: $(TOP_DIR)/components/pacer/src/pacer.c Makefile
	$(CC) -c $(CFLAGS) $< -o $@ -I$(TOP_INCLUDE)

producer_p_p_producer_MON.elf: producer_p_p_producer_MON.o
	$(LD) $(LDFLAGS) $^ $(LIBS) -o $@

producer_p_p_producer.elf: $(UTIL_OBJS) $(TYPE_OBJS) producer_p_p_producer_user.o producer_p_p_producer.o
	$(LD) $(LDFLAGS) $^ $(LIBS) -o $@

consumer_p_p_consumer_MON.elf: consumer_p_p_consumer_MON.o
	$(LD) $(LDFLAGS) $^ $(LIBS) -o $@

consumer_p_p_consumer.elf: $(UTIL_OBJS) $(TYPE_OBJS) consumer_p_p_consumer_user.o consumer_p_p_consumer.o
	$(LD) $(LDFLAGS) $^ $(LIBS) -o $@

consumer_p_s_consumer_MON.elf: consumer_p_s_consumer_MON.o
	$(LD) $(LDFLAGS) $^ $(LIBS) -o $@

consumer_p_s_consumer.elf: $(UTIL_OBJS) $(TYPE_OBJS) consumer_p_s_consumer_user.o consumer_p_s_consumer.o
	$(LD) $(LDFLAGS) $^ $(LIBS) -o $@

monitor_process_monitor_thread_MON.elf: monitor_process_monitor_thread_MON.o
	$(LD) $(LDFLAGS) $^ $(LIBS) -o $@

monitor_process_monitor_thread.elf: $(UTIL_OBJS) $(TYPE_OBJS) monitor_process_monitor_thread_rust monitor_process_monitor_thread.o
	$(LD) $(LDFLAGS) -L ${CRATES_DIR}/monitor_process_monitor_thread/target/aarch64-unknown-none/release $(filter %.o, $^) $(LIBS) -lmonitor_process_monitor_thread -o $@

pacer.elf: $(UTIL_OBJS) $(TYPE_OBJS) pacer.o
	$(LD) $(LDFLAGS) $^ $(LIBS) -o $@

$(IMAGE_FILE): $(IMAGES) $(TOP_DIR)/$(MSD)
	xmllint --xinclude $(TOP_DIR)/$(MSD) | awk 'FNR==1{print; print "<!--"; print "  DO NOT EDIT: This file is generated by merging"; print "    $(TOP_DIR)/$(MSD)"; print "  and its xi:included files."; print "  Modify the source files and run make instead."; print "-->"; next}1' > $(TOP_BUILD_DIR)/$(MSD).merged
	$(MICROKIT_TOOL) $(TOP_BUILD_DIR)/$(MSD).merged --search-path $(TOP_BUILD_DIR) --board $(MICROKIT_BOARD) --config $(MICROKIT_CONFIG) -o $(IMAGE_FILE) -r $(REPORT_FILE)


qemu:
	$(QEMU) -machine virt,virtualization=on \
			-cpu cortex-a53 \
			-serial mon:stdio \
			-device loader,file=$(IMAGE_FILE),addr=0x70000000,cpu-num=0 \
			-m size=2G \
			-nographic

clean::
	rm -f *.o

test:: 
	make -C ${CRATES_DIR}/monitor_process_monitor_thread test

clean:: 
	make -C ${CRATES_DIR}/monitor_process_monitor_thread clean

verus: 
	make -C ${CRATES_DIR}/monitor_process_monitor_thread verus

// Do not edit this file as it will be overwritten if HAMR codegen is rerun

pub type sb_event_counter_t = usize;

// Do not edit this file as it will be overwritten if HAMR codegen is rerun

pub type microkit_channel = u32;

# This file will not be overwritten if HAMR codegen is rerun

[package]
name = "data"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Verus crate dependencies
#
# It is recommended to use the Verus release:
# https://github.com/verus-lang/verus/releases/tag/release/0.2026.01.23.1650a05
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
vstd = { version = "=0.0.0-2026-01-25-0057", default-features=false }
verus_builtin = { version = "=0.0.0-2026-01-25-0057" }
verus_builtin_macros = { version = "=0.0.0-2026-01-25-0057" }

[package.metadata.verus]
verify = true

# This file will not be overwritten if HAMR codegen is rerun

[toolchain]
channel = "nightly"
components = [ "rustfmt", "rust-src", "rustc-dev", "llvm-tools-preview", "rust-analyzer" ]

// This file will not be overwritten if HAMR codegen is rerun

pub mod monitor_process_monitor_thread_app;

# This file will not be overwritten if HAMR codegen is rerun

[package]
name = "monitor_process_monitor_thread"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
data = { path = "../data" }
linux-raw-sys = { version = "=0.12.0", default-features = false }
log = "0.4.28"

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# seL4 Rust crate dependencies
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
sel4 = { git = "https://github.com/seL4/rust-sel4", features = ["single-threaded"], optional = true, tag="v2.0.0" }
sel4-logging = { git = "https://github.com/seL4/rust-sel4", optional = true, tag="v2.0.0" }

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Verus crate dependencies
#
# It is recommended to use the Verus release:
# https://github.com/verus-lang/verus/releases/tag/release/0.2026.01.23.1650a05
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
vstd = { version = "=0.0.0-2026-01-25-0057", default-features=false }
verus_builtin = { version = "=0.0.0-2026-01-25-0057" }
verus_builtin_macros = { version = "=0.0.0-2026-01-25-0057" }


[dev-dependencies]
lazy_static = "1.5.0"
once_cell = "1.21.3"
serial_test = "3.2.0"
proptest = "1.8.0"
env_logger = "0.11.8"

[lib]
path = "src/lib.rs"
crate-type = ["staticlib"]

[features]
sel4 = ["dep:sel4", "dep:sel4-logging" ]

[package.metadata.verus]
verify = true

# This file will not be overwritten if HAMR codegen is rerun

microkit_sdk_config_dir := $(MICROKIT_SDK)/board/$(MICROKIT_BOARD)/$(MICROKIT_CONFIG)

sel4_include_dirs := $(firstword $(wildcard $(microkit_sdk_config_dir)/include \
                                            $(microkit_sdk_config_dir)/debug/include))

ENV_VARS = RUSTC_BOOTSTRAP=1

BUILD_ENV_VARS = $(ENV_VARS) \
                 SEL4_INCLUDE_DIRS=$(abspath $(sel4_include_dirs))

CARGO_FLAGS = -Z build-std=core,alloc,compiler_builtins \
              -Z build-std-features=compiler-builtins-mem \
              --target aarch64-unknown-none

all: build-verus-release

build-verus-release:
	$(BUILD_ENV_VARS) cargo-verus build --features sel4 $(CARGO_FLAGS) --release

build-verus:
	$(BUILD_ENV_VARS) cargo-verus build --features sel4 $(CARGO_FLAGS)

build-release:
	$(BUILD_ENV_VARS) cargo build --features sel4 $(CARGO_FLAGS) --release

build:
	$(BUILD_ENV_VARS) cargo build --features sel4 $(CARGO_FLAGS)

verus:
	$(ENV_VARS) cargo-verus verify $(CARGO_FLAGS)

verus-json:
	$(ENV_VARS) cargo-verus verify $(CARGO_FLAGS) -- --output-json --time > verus_results.json

# Test Example:
#   Run all unit tests
#   Usage: make test
#
#   Run only unit tests whose name contains 'proptest'
#   Usage: make test args=proptest

test-release:
	cargo test $(args) --release

test:
	cargo test $(args)

# Coverage Example:
#   Generate a test coverage report combining the results of all unit tests
#   Usage: make coverage
#
#   Generate a test coverage report for unit tests whose name contains 'proptest'
#   Usage: make coverage args=proptest

coverage:
	cargo install grcov
	@exists=0; if [ -f target/coverage/report/index.html ]; then exists=1; fi; \
	rm -rf target/coverage; \
	CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 RUSTFLAGS='-Cinstrument-coverage' LLVM_PROFILE_FILE='target/coverage/cargo-test-%p-%m.profraw' \
	cargo test $(args); \
	grcov . --binary-path ./target/debug/deps/ -s . -t html --branch --ignore-not-existing -o target/coverage/report; \
	if [ $$exists -eq 0 ]; then open target/coverage/report/index.html; fi

clean:
	cargo clean

# This file will not be overwritten if HAMR codegen is rerun

[toolchain]
channel = "nightly"
components = [ "rustfmt", "rust-src", "rustc-dev", "llvm-tools-preview", "rust-analyzer" ]
